name: TIGO ENERGY, INC.
business: Tigo Energy sells module-level power electronics (MLPE), energy storage systems (GO ESS), and energy intelligence software (EI platform) to the solar industry. Its products include optimizers, rapid shutdown devices, inverters, batteries, and AI-based forecasting software. Customers are primarily distributors and solar installers serving residential, commercial, and utility-scale markets worldwide.

exposures.sentence: The Tigo GO ESS product line offers a complete energy storage solution for residential customers comprised of the GO Battery, GO Inverter, GO Link/Automatic Transfer Switch (ATS), and GO Electric Vehicle (EV) Charger.

Our mission is to deliver smart system solutions, combining hardware and software, which enhance safety, increase energy yield, and lower operating costs of residential, commercial, and utility-scale solar systems.

Tigo Predict+ technology within our Tigo EI software platform marks what we believe is a significant advancement in the realm of energy demand forecasting, leveraging artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning technologies.

catalysts.event: Conclusion of manufacturing relationship with a principal contract manufacturer
catalysts.sentence: We expect our manufacturing relationship with this contract manufacturer to conclude in April 2026.
